name: omarchy_themes
content:
Themes 
Omarchy comes with fourteen beautifu themes. You can seect between them via Stye >
Theme in the Omarchy Menu (Super + Alt + Space) or hop directy to the theme seector
using Super + Ctrl + Shift + Space.
Each theme styes the desktop, termina, neovim, activity screen (btop), notifications
(mako), top bar (waybar), appication auncher (waker), and the ock screen (hyprock).
For Obsidian, you must manuay seect the Omarchy theme via Appearance > Themes
inside the app).
Most themes have a set of background images that you can rotate between using Super
+ Ctrl + Space. But some, ike Kanagawa, has ony one).
You can find even more themes on the extra themes page or even make your own theme.
Tokyo Night
